block.header: paru no sono kurenawi nipopu momo no pana sitaderu miti ni idetatu wotomye
wa ga sono no sumomo no pana ka nipa ni tiru padare no imada nokoritaru kamo
paru makete monoganasiki ni saywo pukete pabuki naku sigi ta ga ta ni ka sumu

sentence.transcription: ta ga ta ni ka sumu

block.header: paru no pi ni pareru yanagwi wo torimotite mireba miyakwo no opoti omopoyu
mononopuno yaswowotomyera ga kumimagapu terawi no upe no katakagwo no pana
tubame kuru toki ni narinu to karigane pa kuni omopitutu kumogakuri naku
paru makete kaku kapyeru tomo akikaze ni momiti no yama wo kwoyekozarame ya
paru sareba kapyeru ko no kari akikaze ni momiti no yama wo kwoyekozarame ya
ywogutati ni nezamete woreba kapase tome kokoro mo sinwoni naku tidori kamo
ywogutatite naku kapatidori ube si koso mukasi no pito mo sinwopikinikyere
sugwi no nwo ni sawodoru kigisi itisirwoku ne ni si mo nakamu komoriduma kamo

sentence.transcription: ne ni si mo naka mu

block.header: asipikino yatuwo no kigisi nakitoyomu asake no kasumi mireba kanasi mo
asadoko ni kikeba parukesi imidukapa asa kogi situtu utapu punabito
kyepu no tame to omopite simesi asipikino wonope no sakura kaku sakinikyeri
okuyama no yatuwo no tubaki tubarakani kyepu pa kurasane masurawo no tomo
karapito mo pune wo ukabete aswobu to pu kyepu so wa ga sekwo panakadura sena

asipikwino yamasaka kwoyete yukikaparu tosinowo nagaku sinazakaru kwosi ni si sumeba opokimi no sikimasu kuni pa miyakwo wo mo koko mo oyazi to kokoro ni pa omopu monokara katarisake misakuru pitome tomosimito omopi si sigesi soko yuweni kokoro nagu ya to akidukeba pagwi sakinipopu ipasenwo ni umadaki yukite wotikoti ni tori pumitate siranuri no kwosuzu mo yurani apaseyari purisakemitutu ikidoporu kokoro no uti wo omopinobe uresibwinagara makuraduku tumaya no uti ni togura yupi suwete zo wa ga kapu masirapu no taka
yakatawo no masirwono taka wo yadwo ni suwe kakinade mitutu kapaku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: kapa ku si yo si mo

block.header: aratamano tosi yukikapari paru sareba pana nomwi nipopu asipikwino yamasita toyomi otitagiti nagaru sakitanokapa no se ni ayukwo sabasiru simatutori ukapi tomonape kagari sasi nadusapiyukeba wagimokwo ga katamigatera to kurenawi no yasipo ni somete okosetaru koromo no suswo mo toporite nurenu
kurenawi no koromo nipopasi sakitagapa tayuru koto naku ware kapyerimimu
tosi no pa ni ayu si pasiraba sakitagapa u yatu kadukete kapase tadunemu
iswo no upe no tumama wo mireba ne wo papete tosi pukaka rasi kamusabwinikyeri

ametuti no topoki pazime ywo yononaka pa tunenaki mono to kataritugi nagarapekitare ama no para purisakemireba teru tukwi mo mitikake sikyeri asipikwino yama no konure mo paru sareba pana sakinipopi akidukeba tuyusimo opite kaze mazipe momiti tirikyeri utusemi mo kaku nomwi na rasi kurenawi no iro mo uturopi nubatamano kurwokami kapari asa no wemi yupupye kaparapi puku kaze no miyenu ga gotoku yuku midu no tomaranu gotoku tune mo naku uturopu mireba nipatadumi nagaruru namita todomwikanetu mo

sentence.transcription: yama no ko n ure mo
mi ye nu ga goto ku

block.header: koto topanu kwi sura paru saki akidukeba momiti tiraku pa tune wo nami koso
koto topanu kwi sura paru saki akidukeba momiti tiraku pa tunenakyemu to zo

sentence.transcription: tune na kye mu to zo

block.header: utusemi no tunenaki mireba yononaka ni kokorotukezute omopu pi zo opoki
utusemi no tunenaki mireba yononaka ni kokorotukezute nageku pi zo opoki
imo ga swode ware makurakamu kapa no se ni kwiri tatiwatare saywo pukenu twoni

titinomwino titi no mikoto papaswobano papa no mikoto oborokani kokorotukusite omopu ramu so no kwo nare ya mo masurawo ya munasiku aru beki adusayumi suwe puriokosi nageya moti tipiro iwatasi turugitati kosi ni toripaki asipikwino yatuwo pumikwoye sasimakuru kokoro sayarazu noti no yo no kataritugu beku na wo tatu besi mo

sentence.transcription: so no kwo nare ya mo
na wo tatu be si mo

block.header: masurawo pa na wo si tatu besi noti no yo ni kikitugu pito mo kataritugu gane

sentence.transcription: na wo si tatu be si

block.header: toki gotoni iya medurasiku yatikusa ni kusakwi pana saki naku tori no kowe mo kaparapu mimi ni kiki me ni miru gotoni utinageki sinayeurabure sinwopitutu arikyeru pasi ni konokure no udukwi si tateba ywogomori ni naku pototogisu inisipye yu kataritugituru ugupisu no utusimakwo kamo ayamyegusa panatatibana wo wotomyera ga tama nuku madeni akanesasu piru pa simyerani asipikwino yatuwo tobikwoye nubatamano yworu pa sugarani akatoki no tukwi ni mukapite yukikapyeri nakitoyomuredo ikani akidaramu
toki gotoni iya medurasiku saku pana wo wori mo worazu mo miraku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: mi raku si yo si mo

block.header: tosi no pa ni kinaku monoyuwe pototogisu kikeba sinwopaku apanu pi wo opomi

sentence.transcription: apa nu pi wo opo mi

block.header: pototogisu kinaku satukwi ni sakinipopu panatatibana no kagupasiki oya no mikoto asayopi ni kikanu pi maneku amazakaru pina ni si woreba asipikwino yama no tawori ni tatu kumo wo yoso nomwi mitutu nageku swora yasukyenaku ni omopu swora kurusiki monowo nagwo no ama no kadukitoru to ipu siratama no migaposi miomowa tadamukapi mimu toki made pa matukapeno sakayeimasane taputwoki a ga kimi
siratama no migaposi kimi wo mizu pisani pina ni si woreba ikyeru to mo nasi

sentence.transcription: ik yeru to mo na si

block.header: tunepito mo okwitutu kiku so pototogisu ko no akatoki ni kinaku patukowe
pototogisu kinakitoyomeba kusatoramu panatatibana wo yadwo ni pa uwezusite
imo wo mizu kwosi no kunipye ni tosi pureba wa ga kokorodwo no naguru pi mo nasi
paru no uti no tanwosiki wope pa ume no pana tawori wokitutu aswobu ni aru besi
pototogisu ima kinakisomu ayamyegusa kaduraku madeni karuru pi arame ya
wa ga kadwo yu nakisugwiwataru pototogisu iya natukasiku kikedo akidarazu

wa ga sekwo to te tadusaparite akekureba idetatimukapi yupu sareba purisakemitutu omopinobe minagwisi yama ni yatuwo ni pa kasumi tanabiki tanipye pa tubakipana saki uraganasi ni paru si sugureba pototogisu iya siki nakinu pitori nomwi kikeba sabusi mo kimi to are to pyedatete kwopuru twonamiyama tobikwoyeyukite aketataba matu no sayeda ni yupu saraba tukwi ni mukapite ayamyegusa tama nuku madeni nakitoyome yasui nesimezu kimi wo nayamase
ware nomwi si kikeba sabusi mo pototogisu nipu no yamapye ni iyuki nakanimo
pototogisu ywonaki wo situtu wa ga sekwo wo yasui na nesime yume kokoroare

paru sugwite natu kimukapeba asipikwino yama ywobitoyome saywonaka ni naku pototogisu patukowe wo kikeba natukasi ayamyegusa panatatibana wo nukimazipe kaduraku madeni satwo toyome naki wataredomo napo si sinwopayu
saywo pukete akatokitukwi ni kage miyete naku pototogisu kikeba natukasi
pototogisu kikedomo akazu amitori ni torite natukena karezu naku gane
pototogisu kapitoposeraba kotosi pete kimukapu natu pa madu nakinamu wo
yamabuki no pana torimotite ture mo naku karenisi imo wo sinwopituru kamo

utusemi pa kwopwi wo sigemito paru makete omopi sigekyeba pikiyodite wori mo worazu mo miru gotoni kokoro nagwimu to sigeyama no tanipye ni opuru yamabuki wo yadwo ni pikiuwete asatuyu ni nipopyeru pana wo miru gotoni omopi pa yamazu kwopwi si sigesi mo
yamabuki wo yadwo ni uwete pa miru gotoni omopi pa yamazu kwopwi koso masare

omopu dwoti masurawonokwo no konokure no sigeki omopi wo miakirame kokoro yaramu to pusenoumi ni wobune turaname makai kake ikogimegureba wopu no ura ni kasumi tanabiki tarupimye ni pudinami sakite pama kiywoku siranami sawaki sikusikuni kwopwi pa masaredo kyepu nomwi ni akidarame ya mo kaku si koso iya tosi no pa ni parupana no sigeki sakari ni aki no pa no momitapu toki ni arigaywopi mitutu sinwopame ko no pusenoumi wo

sentence.transcription: ko no puse no umi wo

block.header: pudinami no pana no sakari ni kaku si koso ura kogimwitutu tosi ni sinwopame

amazakaru pina to si areba soko koko mo oyazi kokoro so ipyesakari tosi no penureba utusemi pa monomopi sigesi soko yuweni kokoronagusa ni pototogisu naku patukowe wo tatibana no tama ni apenuki kadurakite aswobapu pasi mo masurawo wo tomonapetatete sikuragapa nadusapinobori pirase ni pa sade sasiwatasi payaki se ni u wo kaduketutu tukwi ni pi ni sika si aswobane pasiki wa ga sekwo
sikuragapa se wo tadunetutu wa ga sekwo pa ukapa tatasane kokoronagusa ni
ukapa tati torasamu ayu no si ga pata pa ware ni kakimuke omopi si omopaba

momo no pana kurenawiiro ni nipopitaru omowa no uti ni awoyagwi no posoki maywone wo wemimagari asakage mitutu wotomyera ga te ni torimoteru maswokagami putagamiyama ni konokure no sigeki tanipye wo ywobitoyome asa tobiwatari yupudukuywo kaswokeki nwopye ni parwoparwoni naku pototogisu tatikuku to paburi ni tirasu pudinami no pana natukasimi pikiyodite swode ni kwokiretu simaba simu tomo
pototogisu naku paburi ni mo tirinikyeri sakari sugu rasi pudinami no pana
pototogisu naku paburi ni mo tirinu bemi swode ni kwokiretu pudinami no pana
pototogisu naki watarinu to tuguredomo ware kikitugazu pana pa sugwitutu
wa ga kokoda sinwopaku sirani pototogisu idupye no yama wo naki ka kwoyu ramu
tukwi tatisi pi ywori wokitutu utizinwopi matedo kinakanu pototogisu kamo
imo ni niru kusa to misi ywori wa ga simesi nwopye no yamabuki tare ka taworisi
ture mo naku karenisi mono to pito pa ipedo apanu pi manemi omopi zo wa ga suru

sentence.transcription: omopi zo wa ga su ru

block.header: pudinami no kage nasu umi no soko kiywomi siduku isi wo mo tama to zo wa ga miru

sentence.transcription: tama to zo wa ga mi ru

block.header: takwonoura no soko sape nipopu pudinami wo kazasite yukamu minu pito no tame
isasakani omopite kosi wo takwonoura ni sakyeru pudi mite pitoywo penu besi

sentence.transcription: pito ywo pe nu be si

block.header: pudinami wo karipo ni tukuri uramwi suru pito to pa sirani ama to ka mi ramu
ipye ni yukite nani wo kataramu asipikwino yamapototogisu pitokowe mo nakye
wa ga sekwo ga sasagete moteru popogasipa atakamo niru ka awoki kinugasa
sumyeroki no topomiyomiyo pa isikiwori ki nomiki to ipu so ko no popogasipa

sentence.transcription: topo mi yo mi yo pa
ki nomi ki to ipu so

block.header: sibutani wo sasite wa ga yuku ko no pama ni tukuywo akitemu uma simasi tome

koko nisite sogapi ni miyuru wa ga sekwo ga kakitu no tani ni akesareba pari no sayeda ni yupu sareba pudi no sigemi ni parwoparwoni naku pototogisu wa ga yadwo no uwekwitatibana panani tiru toki wo madasimi kinakanaku soko pa uramwizu sikaredomo tani katadukite ipye wiseru kimi ga kikitutu tugenaku mo usi
wa ga kokoda matedo kinakanu pototogisu pitori kikitutu tugenu kimi kamo

tani tikaku ipye pa woredomo kodakakute satwo pa aredomo pototogisu imada kinakazu naku kowe wo kikamaku pori to asita ni pa kadwo ni idetati yupubye ni pa tani wo miwatasi kwopuredomo pitokowe dani mo imada kikoyezu
pudinami no sigeri pa sugwinu asipikwino yamapototogisu nado ka kinakanu

inisipye ni arikyeru waza no kusubasiki koto to ipitugu tinuwotokwo unapiwotokwo no utusemi no na wo araswopu to tamakiparu inoti mo sutete araswopi ni tumadopi sikyeru wotomyera ga kikeba kanasisa parupanano nipoyesakayete aki no pa no nipopi ni tereru atarasiki mwi no sakari sura masurawo no koto itapasimi titipapa ni mawosiwakarete ipyezakari umibye ni idetati asayopi ni mitikuru sipo no yapyenami ni nabiku tamamo no pusi no ma mo wosiki inoti wo tuyusimono sugwimasinikyere okutukwi wo koko to sadamete noti no yo no kikitugu pito mo iya toponi sinwopi ni seyo to tugewogusi sika sasikye rasi opwite nabikyeri
wotomyera ga noti no sirusi to tugewogusi opwikapariopwite nabikikye rasi mo
ayu wo itami nagwo no uramwi ni yosuru nami iya tipyesiki ni kwopwiwataru kamo

ametuti no pazime no toki yu utusomi no yaswotomonowo pa opokimi ni maturwopu mono to sadamareru tukasa ni si areba opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi pinazakaru kuni wo wosamu to asipikwino yamakapa pyenari kazekumo ni koto pa kaywopedo tadani apazu pi no kasanareba omopikwopwi ikiduki woru ni tamapokono miti kuru pito no tutekoto ni ware ni kataraku pasikiyosi kimi pa ko no koro urasabwite nagekapiimasu yononaka no ukyeku turakyeku saku pana mo toki ni uturopu utusemi mo tunenaku arikyeri taratineno mipapa no mikoto nani si ka mo toki si pa aramu wo maswokagami miredomo akazu tama no wo no wosiki sakari ni tatu kwiri no useyuku gotoku oku tuyu no kenuru ga gotoku tamamo nasu nabiki koipusi yuku midu no todomwikanetu to magakoto ya pito no ipituru oyodure wo pito no tugeturu adusayumi tumapiku ywooto no topooto ni mo kikeba kanasimi nipatadumi nagaruru namita todomwikanetu mo

sentence.transcription: ya swo tomo no wo pa
toki si pa ara mu wo

block.header: topoto ni mo kimi ga nageku to kikitureba ne nomwi si nakayu apiomopu ware pa
yononaka no tunenaki koto pa siru ramu wo kokorotukusu na masurawo nisite
unopana wo kutasu nagame no panamidu ni yoru kotumi nasu yoramu kwo moga mo
sibi tuku to ama no tomoseru izaripwi no po ni ka idasamu wa ga sitamopi wo
wa ga yadwo no pagwi sakinikyeri akikaze no pukamu wo mataba ito topomi kamo

watatumi no kamwi no mikoto no mikusige ni takupapiokite ituku to pu tama ni masarite omopyerisi a ga kwo ni pa aredo utusemino yo no kotowari to masurawo no piki no manima ni sinazakaru kwosidi wo sasite papututano wakarenisi ywori okitunami towomu maywobiki opobuneno yukurayukurani omokage ni motona miyetutu kaku kwopwiba oiduku a ga mwi kedasi apemu kamo

sentence.transcription: a ga kwo ni pa aredo

block.header: kaku bakari kwopwisiku si araba maswokagami minu pitoki naku aramasi monowo

sentence.transcription: mi nu pi toki na ku

block.header: ko no sigure itaku na puri so wagimokwo ni misemu ga tameni momiti toritemu
awoniyosi narapito mimu to wa ga sekwo ga simekyemu momiti tuti ni otime ya mo

sentence.transcription: tuti ni oti me ya mo

block.header: asagwiri no tanabiku tawi ni naku kari wo todomwiemu kamo wa ga yadwo no pagwi
asipikwino yama no momiti ni siduku apite tiramu yamadi wo kimi ga kwoyemaku
ko no yuki no kenokoru toki ni iza yukana yamatatibana no mwi no teru mo mimu

sentence.transcription: mwi no teru mo mi mu

block.header: opotono no ko no motopori no yuki na pumi sone sibasiba mo puranu yuki so yama nomwi ni purisi yuki so yume yoru na pito ya na pumi sone yuki pa

sentence.transcription: na pumi so ne yuki pa

block.header: aritutu mo myesitamapamu zo opotono no ko no motopori no yuki na pumi sone
aratasiki tosi no pazime pa iya tosi ni yuki puminarasi tune kaku ni moga
puru yuki wo kosi ni nadumite mawirikosi sirusi mo aru ka tosi no pazime ni
nadesikwo pa aki saku monowo kimi ga ipye no yuki no ipapo ni sakyerikyeru kamo
yuki no sima ipapo ni uwetaru nadesikwo pa tiyo ni sakanu ka kimi ga kazasi ni

sentence.transcription: ti yo ni saka nu ka

block.header: utipabuki tori pa naku tomo kaku bakari purisiku yuki ni kimi imasame ya mo
naku tori pa iya siki nakedo puru yuki no tipye ni tume koso ware tatikatene
amakumo wo poroni pumiadasi naru kamwi mo kyepu ni masarite kasikwokyeme ya mo

ametuti no kamwi pa nakare ya utukusiki wa ga tuma sakaru pikarukamwi nari patawotomye tadusapete tomoni aramu to omopisi ni kokoro tagapinu ipamu subye semu subye sirani yuputasuki kata ni torikake situnusa wo te ni torimotite na sake so to ware pa inoredo makite nesi imo ga tamoto pa kumo ni tanabiku
ututu ni to omopitesi kamo ime nomwi ni tamoto maki nu to mireba subye nasi
kimi ga yuki mosi pisaniaraba ume yanagwi tare to tomoni ka wa ga kadurakamu
putagami no wonope no sige ni komorinisi so no pototogisu matedo kinakazu

sentence.transcription: wo no pe no sige ni

block.header: opobune ni makadi sizinuki ko no agwo wo karakuni pye yaru ipapye kamwitati
kasuganwo ni ituku mimoro no ume no pana sakayete arimate kapyerikuru made
amakumo no yukikapyerinamu mono yuweni omopi zo wa ga suru wakare kanasimi

sentence.transcription: omopi zo wa ga su ru

block.header: suminoye ni ituku papuri ga kamukoto to yuku tomo ku tomo pune pa payakyemu
aratamano tosinowo nagaku wa ga mopyeru kwora ni kwopu beki tukwi tikadukinu

sentence.transcription: kwo ra ni kwopu be ki

block.header: sworamitu yamatonokuni awoniyosi naranomiyakwo yu ositeru nanipa ni kudari suminoye no mitu ni punanori tada watari pi no iru kuni ni tukapasaru wa ga se no kimi wo kakemaku no yuyusikasikwoki suminoye no wa ga opomikamwi punanope ni usipakiimasi punadomo ni mitatiimasite sasiyoramu iswo no sakizaki kogi patemu tomaritomari ni araki kaze nami ni apasezu tapirakeku wite kapyerimase moto no mikadwo ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga se no kimi wo

block.header: oki tu nami pyenami na kwosi so kimi ga pune kogikapyerikite tu ni paturu made
amakumono sokipye no kipami wa ga mopyeru kimi ni wakaremu pi tikaku narinu
aratamano tosinowo nagaku apimitesi so no kokorobiki wasurayeme ya mo
ipasenwo ni akipagwi sinwogi uma namete patutogari dani sezu ya wakaremu
sinazakaru kwosi ni itutose sumisumite tatiwakaremaku wosiki yopi kamo
tamapokono miti ni idetati yuku ware pa kimi ga kototo wo opite si yukamu
kimi ga ipye ni uwetaru pagwi no patupana wo worite kazasana tabi wakaru dwoti
tatite wite matedo matikane idete kosi kimi ni koko ni api kazasituru pagwi

akidusima yamatonokuni wo amakumo ni ipapune ukabe tomo ni pe ni makai sizinuki ikogitutu kunimi si sesite amorimasi parapikotomuke tiyo kasane iya tugitugini sirasikyeru ama no pitugi to kamunagara wa go opokimi no ame no sita wosametamapeba mononopuno yaswotomonowo wo nadetamapi totonopetamapi wosu kuni no yomo no pito wo mo abusapazu megumitamapeba inisipye yu nakarisi sirusi tabimaneku mawositamapinu tamudakite kotonaki miyo to ametuti pitukwi to tomoni yoroduyo ni sirusitugamu zo yasumisisi wa go opokimi aki no pana si ga iroiro ni myesitamapi akirametamapi sakamiduki sakayuru kyepu no ayani taputwosa

sentence.transcription: ya swo tomo no wo wo
koto na ki mi yo to

block.header: aki no pana kusagusani aredo iro gotoni myesiakiramuru kyepu no taputwosa
inisipye ni kimi no miyo pete tukapekyeri wa ga oponusi pa nanayo mawosane
tatukayumi te ni torimotite asakari ni kimi pa tatasinu tanakura no nwo ni
asukagapa kapatwo wo kiywomi okurewite kwopureba miyakwo iya toposokinu
kamunadukwi sigure no tune ka wa ga sekwo ga yadwo no momitiba tirinu beku miyu
opokimi pa kamwi ni si maseba akagwoma no parabapu tawi wo miyakwo to nasitu
opokimi pa kamwi ni si maseba midutori no sudaku minuma wo miyakwo to nasitu
karakuni ni yukitarapasite kapyerikomu masuratakyewo ni miki tatematuru
kusi mo mizi ya n uti mo pakazi kusamakura tabi yuku kimi wo ipapu to mopite

sworamitu yamatonokuni pa midu no upe pa tuti yuku gotoku pune no upe pa toko ni woru goto opokamwi no sidumuru kuni so yotu no pune punanope narabe tapirakeku paya watarikite kapyerigoto mawosamu pi ni apinomamu ki zo ko no toyomiki pa

sentence.transcription: ko no toyo mi ki pa

block.header: yotu no pune paya kapyeriko to sirakatuku wa ga mo no suswo ni ipapite matamu

sentence.transcription: wa ga mo no suswo ni

block.header: asipikwino yatuwo no upe no tuga no kwi no iya tugitugini matuganeno tayuru koto naku awoniyosi naranomiyakwo ni yoroduyo ni kuni sirasamu to yasumisisi wa go opokimi no kamunagara omoposimyesite toyono akari myesu kyepu no pi pa mononopuno yaswotomonowo no simayama ni akaru tatibana uzu ni sasi pimo tokisakete titose poki poki toyomosi werawerani tukapematuru wo miru ga taputwosa

sentence.transcription: ya tu wo no upe no
ya swo tomo no wo no

block.header: sumyeroki no miyo yoroduyo ni kaku si koso myesiakirameme tatu tosi no pa ni
ko no satwo pa tugite simo ya oku natu no nwo ni wa ga misi kusa pa momititarikyeri

sentence.transcription: wa ga mi si kusa pa

block.header: yoso nomwi ni mite pa arisi wo kyepu mite pa tosi ni wasurezu omopoyemu kamo
mugura papu iyasiki yadwo mo opokimi no masamu to siraba tama sikamasi wo
matukage no kiywoki pamapye ni tama sikaba kimi kimasamu ka kiywoki pamapye ni
ametuti ni tarapasi terite wa go opokimi sikimaseba ka mo tanwosiki wosatwo
ametuti to apisakayemu to opomiya wo tukapematureba taputwoku uresiki
ama ni pa mo ipotutuna papu yoroduyo ni kuni sirasamu to i po tu tuna papu
ametuti to pisasiki madeni yoroduyo ni tukapematuramu kurwoki sirwoki wo
simayama ni tereru tatibana uzu ni sasi tukapematuru pa mapyetukimitati
swode tarete iza wa ga sono ni ugupisu no kodutapi tirasu ume no pana mi ni
asipikwino yamasita pikage kadurakyeru upe ni ya sarani ume wo sinwopamu
notogapano noti ni pa apamu simasiku mo wakaru to ipeba kanasiku mo aru ka
tatiwakare kimi ga imasaba sikwisima no pito pa wareziku ipapite matamu
sirayuki no purisiku yama wo kwoyeyukamu kimi wo so motona iki no wo ni omopu
koto sigemi apitwopanaku ni ume no pana yuki ni siworete uturopamu kamo
ume no pana sakyeru ga naka ni pupumyeru pa kwopwi ya komoreru yuki wo matu to ka
aratasiki tosi no pazime ni omopu dwoti imurete woreba uresiku mo aru ka
opomiya no uti ni mo two ni mo medurasiku pureru opoyuki na pumi sone wosi

sentence.transcription: uti ni mo two ni mo

block.header: misonopu no take no payasi ni ugupisu pa sibanakinisi wo yuki pa puritutu
ugupisu no nakisi kakitu ni nipopyerisi ume ko no yuki ni uturopu ramu ka
kapasu ni mo yuki pa purere si miya no uti ni tidori naku rasi wimu tokoro nami
awoyagwi no potuye yoditori kaduraku pa kimi ga yadwo ni si titose poku to so
paru no nwo ni kasumi tanabiki uraganasi ko no yupukage ni ugupisu naku mo
wa ga yadwo no isasamuratake puku kaze no oto no kaswokeki ko no yupubye kamo
uraurani tereru parupi ni pibari agari kokoro kanasi mo pitori si omopeba
